**Dock Worker - Charlotte, NC - $20-24/hr**

Join our growing team at a leading LTL terminal in Charlotte, NC. We specialize in freight loading and unloading, ensuring timely and safe delivery of goods. We pride ourselves on our hardworking team and commitment to excellence in logistics.

**Requirements:**
- 1+ year of freight or dock experience
- Forklift certification required
- Ability to lift 75 lbs repeatedly
- Strong attention to detail and safety practices
- Reliable transportation to work

**Nice to Have:**
- Previous experience in a fast-paced warehouse environment
- Knowledge of shipping and receiving processes
- Basic computer skills for tracking shipments

**Schedule Details:**
- Early morning shift starting at 5 AM
- Full-time position with potential overtime
- Must be available to work weekends as needed

If you're ready to roll up your sleeves and work hard, apply now!
